ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the model was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the model is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_model_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_type_id") REFERENCES model_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the hyperparameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hyperparameter name */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the hyperparameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_parameter_name_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_name_id") REFERENCES parameter_names ("parameter_name_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., accuracy, precision, recall) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_data" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance data point */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the performance data belongs to */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date the performance data was recorded */,
  "performance_metric" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., accuracy, precision, recall) */,
  "performance_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_data_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the model type (e.g., Decision Tree, Neural Network) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the model type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "criterions" (
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each criterion */,
  "criterion_name" TEXT /* Name of the criterion (e.g., gini, entropy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the criterion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criterion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "max_depths" (
  "max_depth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maximum depth */,
  "max_depth_value" INTEGER /* Value of the maximum depth */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the maximum depth */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("max_depth_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_names" (
  "parameter_name_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter name */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter (e.g., criterion, max_depth) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the hyperparameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_name_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., accuracy, precision, recall) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
